table.name: vtiger_periodicalmaintainence
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_periodicalmaintainence` ( `periodicalmaintainenceid` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `subject` VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`periodicalmaintainenceid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

table.name: vtiger_periodicalmaintainencecf
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_periodicalmaintainencecf` ( `periodicalmaintainenceid` int(11) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`periodicalmaintainenceid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8
